calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment And Of Non Appearance
Off Calendar Aug-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopts its tentative ruling on
PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Judgment And Of Non Appearance as follows:

The unopposed motion is granted. The judgment is hereby vacated.

Counsel for the plaintiffs is to prepare a proposed order, and submit it to the judge pro tem Tom Cohen for review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Matter not reported. (302/JPT)
